summary: Iteration 27 - Custom Token Features (Phase 1-4) fully verified. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Dashboard shows 'Crea Token Personalizzato' button, 'Token Market' button, 'I Miei Token Personalizzati' section, and Live Balances widget. Token Creation page (/tokens/create) has all form fields. Custom Token Trade page (/custom-tokens) has Buy/Sell/Swap tabs with live balances sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 1 (Create Token): POST /api/neno-exchange/create-token works correctly - validates symbol max 8 chars, rejects duplicates, mints supply to creator
Phase 1 (My Tokens): GET /api/neno-exchange/my-tokens returns user's tokens with balances
Phase 2 (Buy): POST /api/neno-exchange/buy-custom-token deducts pay_asset and credits token
Phase 2 (Sell): POST /api/neno-exchange/sell-custom-token deducts token and credits receive_asset
Phase 3 (Swap): POST /api/neno-exchange/swap works for custom<->native pairs via NENO bridge
Phase 3 (Quote): GET /api/neno-exchange/swap-quote returns accurate quotes with fees
Phase 4 (Live Balances): GET /api/neno-exchange/live-balances returns all balances with USD values and is_custom flag
Frontend Dashboard has all required elements: create-custom-token-btn, custom-token-market-btn, my-custom-tokens-section, live-balances-dashboard
Frontend /tokens/create has all form fields: token-name-input, token-symbol-input, token-supply-input, token-price-input, create-token-submit-btn
Frontend /custom-tokens has Buy/Sell/Swap tabs with live balances sidebar showing custom tokens marked with 'custom' label
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test tokens during testing (T*, D*, B*, S*, L*, LC* symbols)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified all 4 phases of custom token system. Key endpoints: create-token, my-tokens, buy-custom-token, sell-custom-token, swap, swap-quote, live-balances, custom-tokens. Frontend pages: /tokens/create (token creation form), /custom-tokens (Buy/Sell/Swap with live balances). Dashboard has quick access buttons and 'I Miei Token Personalizzati' section. Rate limiting is active (429 after ~10 rapid requests).

phase_1_create_token.POST /api/neno-exchange/create-token: PASS - Creates token with name, symbol (max 8), supply, price_usd
phase_1_create_token.Duplicate symbol rejection: PASS - Returns 400 'Il token X esiste gia'
phase_1_create_token.GET /api/neno-exchange/my-tokens: PASS - Returns user's tokens with balances

phase_2_buy_sell.POST /api/neno-exchange/buy-custom-token: PASS - Buys tokens with EUR/USDT/BTC etc
phase_2_buy_sell.POST /api/neno-exchange/sell-custom-toke: PASS - Sells tokens for EUR/USDT/BTC etc

phase_3_swap.GET /api/neno-exchange/swap-quote: PASS - Returns quote with receive_amount, rate, fee_pct
phase_3_swap.Same asset swap rejection: PASS - Returns 400 'Non puoi swappare lo stesso asset'

phase_4_live_balances.GET /api/neno-exchange/live-balances: PASS - Returns balances with price_usd, value_usd, is_custom flag
phase_4_live_balances.GET /api/neno-exchange/custom-tokens: PASS - Returns all custom tokens list

frontend_custom_token_trade.live-balances-panel: PASS - Shows all balances with custom token labels

mocked_apis.note: All token/swap/balance APIs are REAL MongoDB operations
